# Yamada Ichiro Portfolio - Full LLM Context

Last updated: 2026-07-02
Canonical: https://www.galkins.dev/

## Identity
Name: Yamada Ichiro
Role: Full-Stack Developer
Location: Japan
Primary focus: Frontend-heavy full-stack applications, clean UI, performance, and maintainable architecture.

## About
Yamada Ichiro creates responsive, accessible, and scalable web applications with clean structure and minimalist design principles.
His work combines design thinking with engineering rigor, balancing visual clarity, performance, and usability.

Background highlights:
- Started with drawing, visual design, and motion editing.
- Progressed into game development and coding.
- Transitioned into UI design and then web/software development.
- Current work focuses on turning creative ideas into functional products.

## What This Website Contains
- Hero section with personal intro and role.
- About section with background and development philosophy.
- Skills section grouped by development area.
- Projects section with selected portfolio projects.
- Contact section with form and direct contact links.

## Project Catalog
1) COHINA
- URL: https://cohina.net/
- Description: COHINA online store (https://cohina.net/), featuring e-commerce layout and responsive design tailored for the Japanese market.
- Technologies: Corporate, Responsive Design, Japanese market

2) Mobirise Japan
- URL: https://mobirise.jp/
- Description: Japanese landing page for Mobirise, showcasing the website builder with localized content and modern UI.
- Technologies: Landing Page, Localization, UI/UX

3) Silver Studio
- URL: https://silver784578.studio.site/
- Description: A creative studio site built on STUDIO, with a polished visual identity and smooth browsing experience.
- Technologies: STUDIO, Creative, Responsive Design

4) Product Senses
- URL: https://product-senses.mazrica.com/
- Description: Product marketing site for Mazrica Product Senses platform, focused on clear messaging and conversion.
- Technologies: SaaS, Marketing, Product

5) Visioncon Global
- URL: https://visioncon-global.com/
- Description: Global corporate website for Visioncon, presenting services and brand presence with a professional design.
- Technologies: Corporate, Global, Branding

6) LMI
- URL: https://www.lmi.ne.jp/
- Description: Official website for LMI Japan, delivering structured information architecture and accessible navigation.
- Technologies: Corporate, Japan, Accessibility

## Skills Snapshot
Development:
- HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, PHP

Frontend:
- React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, SASS/SCSS

Backend and Data:
- MySQL, SQL, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, JSON, Fetch API, Webpack, npm, Jest, Express.js, Hono

Tools:
- WordPress, MAMP, LocalWP, VS Code, Figma, Git, Vercel
